message:
chore(artifacts): refresh verification evidence from concurrent agent re-runs

Update verification_evidence.json and verification_summary.md files across
sections 10.4-10.15, 13, and migration cohort 15 with latest automated
verification sweep results from concurrent agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
